name: bids-fix-sidecars
description: Run bids-validator against a written dataset, auto-apply unambiguous JSON sidecar fixes, and surface the rest for the user to edit

bids_dir.description: Path to the written BIDS dataset directory
Path to the updated BIDS dataset directory (same as input)

valid.description: Whether the dataset passes bids-validator after fixes

fixes_applied.description: Number of sidecar fields auto-populated (e.g. TaskName from filename)

remaining_errors.description: Number of validator errors still present after auto-fixing

remaining_warnings.description: Number of validator warnings still present after auto-fixing

block.label: Fix BIDS Sidecars
block.description: Auto-fix what can be derived, then let the user edit remaining JSON sidecar issues in a form
